calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-06-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment-Unlimited Civil Jurisdiction
Off Calendar Aug-09-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Katherine Hipp Chiropractic, Inc., a corporation, and Katherine L. Hipp, a/k/a Kathereine L. Anderson, a/k/a Katherine Anderson-Hipp.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:49 a.m. and concluding at 11:07 a.m.

Denis Klavdianos, Esq. appeared for appeared for plaintiff TBF Financial I, LLC, a limited liability company.
Brent Boehm, Account Manager and Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Klavdianos and Boehm appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendants Katherine Hipp Chiropractic, Inc., a corporation, or Katherine L. Hipp, a/k/a Kathereine L. Anderson, a/k/a Katherine Anderson-Hipp.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Money Due on Equipment Finance Agreement and for Attorney Fees was filed 04/20/2022, and personally served on defendants Katherine Hipp Chiropractic, Inc., a corporation, and Katherine L. Hipp, a/k/a Kathereine L. Anderson, a/k/a Katherine Anderson-Hipp, on April 27, 2022.
Defaults as to each defendant were entered on June 3, 2022.
DOE defendants were dismissed June 6, 2022.
Assignment of Claims from Financial Pacific Financial to TBF Financial I, LLC, a limited liability company was filed June 6, 2022.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff TBF Financial I, LLC, a limited liability company, and against the defaulted defendants Katherine Hipp Chiropractic, Inc., a corporation, and Katherine L. Hipp, a/k/a Kathereine L. Anderson, a/k/a Katherine Anderson-Hipp, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $25,493.89.
Prejudgment Interest - $9,817.17.
Attorney Fees - $1,875.00.
Costs - $585.07.

Total - $37,771.13.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Proceedings concluded at 11:07.
